scoringPlays.text: Roderick Robinson II 1 Yd pass from Gunner Stockton (Peyton Woodring Kick)
Dillon Bell 5 Yd pass from Gunner Stockton (Peyton Woodring Kick)
Nate Frazier 9 Yd Run (Peyton Woodring Kick)
Germie Bernard 23 Yd pass from Ty Simpson (Conor Talty Kick)
Zachariah Branch 13 Yd pass from Gunner Stockton (Peyton Woodring Kick)

videos.headline: Nate Frazier extends Georgia's lead with 9-yard TD run
videos.description: Nate Frazier barrels into the end zone for a 9-yard touchdown to give Georgia a 21-0 lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Nate Frazier extends Georgia's lead with 9-yard TD run) 2025/12/06 ESHEET

videos.headline: Georgia dominates Alabama in SEC title game
videos.description: Georgia takes home the SEC crown after crushing Alabama 28-7.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Highlight (Georgia dominates Alabama in SEC title game) 2025/12/06 ESHEET

videos.headline: Highlight: No. 3 Georgia overpowers No. 9 Alabama for SEC Championship
videos.description: Gunner Stockton shows up when the lights are brightest, throwing three touchdowns on 20-for-26 passing in a convincing 28-7 win over the Crimson Tide.

videos.headline: Gunner Stockton connects with Roderick Robinson II for 1-yard TD
videos.description: Georgia takes the lead on a Gunner Stockton 1-yard touchdown pass to Roderick Robinson II.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Gunner Stockton connects with Roderick Robinson II for 1-yard TD) 2025/12/06 ESHEET

videos.headline: Georgia blocks Alabama punt attempt to set up great field position
videos.description: Cole Speer blocks the Alabama punt attempt for Georgia to give the Bulldogs great field position.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Georgia blocks Alabama punt attempt to set up great field position) 2025/12/06 ESHEET

videos.headline: Daylen Everette picks off Ty Simpson
videos.description: Daylen Everette gives Georgia the ball back with an interception on Ty Simpson.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Daylen Everette picks off Ty Simpson) 2025/12/06 ESHEET

videos.headline: Dillon Bell hauls in 5-yard TD pass from Gunner Stockton
videos.description: Gunner Stockton finds Dillon Bell for a 5-yard touchdown to extend Georgia's lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Dillon Bell hauls in 5-yard TD pass from Gunner Stockton) 2025/12/06 ESHEET

videos.headline: Alabama gets on the board with a Germie Bernard TD
videos.description: Ty Simpson finds Germie Bernard for a 23-yard touchdown to cut into Georgia's lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Alabama gets on the board with a Germie Bernard TD) 2025/12/06 ESHEET

videos.headline: Gunner Stockton finds Zachariah Branch for a 13-yard TD
videos.description: Zachariah Branch puts Georgia up 3 scores with a 13-yard receiving touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Gunner Stockton finds Zachariah Branch for a 13-yard TD) 2025/12/06 ESHEET

videos.headline: UGA's Gunner Stockton expands on receiving SEC Championship MVP
videos.description: After the team claims that Stockton "is the one" after being awarded MVP of the SEC Championship game against Bama, he gives all the credit to his Bulldog teammates.

videos.headline: Gunner Stockton details what made Georgia successful in win vs. Bama
videos.description: Stockton recaps the Bulldogs' electric performance through all four quarters and commends the defensive weapons for holding off the Crimson Tide to secure the SEC Championship title.

videos.headline: CJ Allen credits Georgia's preparation for SEC Championship win vs. Bama
videos.description: Allen remembers all the work the Bulldogs have put in throughout the season to get to this point and previews what to expect from them in the CFP after winning the SEC Title.

tracking.trackingName: SEC_NCF Interview (Cj Allen Uga Champ Win) 251206

videos.headline: Kirby Smart details UGA's winning mentality after SEC Championship
videos.description: Smart addresses the Bulldogs battling adversity while discussing the mentality to keep getting better and thanks the UGA band and fans for showing out after securing SEC title.

videos.headline: Analyzing where Alabama went wrong in matchup against Georgia
videos.description: The SEC Nation crew recap the Crimson Tide's performance and discuss where things went wrong as they explain how the Bulldogs' hungry mentality led them to the SEC title.

tracking.trackingName: SEC_NCF Analysis (Where bama went wrong analysis) 251206
